script.title: David and Goliath 🗡️ | Bible Story for Kids

scenes.narration: Long ago, a giant named Goliath stood tall and shouted at the people of Israel. He was nine feet of armor, sword, and pride. Everyone trembled.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of a huge bronze-armored giant Goliath standing in a sunny valley, towering over scared Israelite soldiers, bright cheerful biblical art, family-friendly, soft watercolor style

scenes.narration: But a young shepherd boy named David was bringing food to his brothers. He was small, kind, and trusted God with his whole heart.
scenes.image_prompt: Cheerful storybook illustration of a young shepherd boy David in a simple tunic, holding bread and cheese, walking through golden fields with sheep, warm sunlight, biblical times, family-friendly art

scenes.narration: When David heard the giant's threats, he was not afraid. He told King Saul, the same God who saved me from lions will save me today.
scenes.image_prompt: Bright storybook scene of brave young David speaking to King Saul inside a royal tent, golden lamp light, kind and confident expression, biblical robes, colorful family-friendly illustration

scenes.narration: David refused heavy armor. Instead, he chose five smooth stones from a quiet stream and held tight to his simple shepherd's sling.
scenes.image_prompt: Beautiful storybook illustration of young David crouching by a sparkling stream, picking up smooth river stones, sling in hand, peaceful sunlit valley, cheerful colors, biblical art

scenes.narration: Goliath laughed at the boy. But David said, you come with a sword, but I come in the name of the Lord, the God of Israel.
scenes.image_prompt: Storybook scene of small brave David facing the towering giant Goliath in a wide green valley, both armies watching from the hills, dramatic but family-friendly, bright colors

scenes.narration: David ran toward the giant. He swung his sling once, twice, three times. The stone flew straight and true through the morning air.
scenes.image_prompt: Dynamic storybook illustration of young David running fearlessly forward, sling swinging above his head, motion lines, blue sky and golden valley, cheerful biblical art style

scenes.narration: The stone struck Goliath's forehead, and the great giant fell to the ground. The whole army of Israel cheered with joyful, thankful hearts.
scenes.image_prompt: Family-friendly storybook scene of the giant Goliath falling backwards in the valley, David standing small but victorious, Israelite soldiers raising hands and cheering, bright sunlight, cheerful art

scenes.narration: Even the smallest hero can do great things when God is with them. You are never too young, too small, or too quiet to be brave.
scenes.image_prompt: Warm closing storybook illustration of young David standing on a hill at sunset, sheep around him, golden light, peaceful smile, cross-shaped clouds in the sky, biblical, hopeful, family-friendly
